title: Thiruttu Paya Pulla Lyrics Thagararu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Thiruttu Paya Pulla
Singer(s): Karthik
Music: Dharan Kumar
Movie: Thagararu

Thiruttu Paya Pulla, Thiruttu Paya Pulla
morattu idhayatha nee odachitiye odachitiye

Usura tholachiten, ulukki eduthitta
sundum vizhiyaala iluthitiye, iluthitiye
I am, I luv you,
you luv me sollu
thavikureney, thudikkureney
dhinam kudichi polamburen
i am so happy, you happy tell-u
valiyureney, kolayureney, kanavellaam medhakuren

Thiruttu Paya Pulla, Thiruttu Paya Pulla
morattu idhayatha nee odachitiye odachitiye

Dhinam dhinam irakkuren
thirumbavum porakkuren
heart-ellam odharudhu
dhinam kaalayum maalayum
kadhal kolludhey

Thavikuren, thudikuren, nenaikuren
unnathaandi ..
heart-ellaam padharudhu
usur unnayum ennayum sera solludhu

Penney adi penney
unnai imayaai kaapeney
thaeney sendheney dhinam
thaniyaai thavithaeney

yes yes yes cuse me
un luv give-u  ...( Thiruttu Paya Pulla ..)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thiruttu Paya Pulla?

The song conveys a playful and romantic vibe, expressing feelings of love and happiness.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Thagararu?

In the movie, the song reflects the light-hearted moments between the lead characters, showcasing their romantic chemistry.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Karthik and composed by Dharan Kumar.

When was Thiruttu Paya Pulla released?

The song was released on November 18, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thiruttu Paya Pulla, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song captures the essence of youthful love, with Karthik's energetic vocals bringing the playful lyrics to life. It serves as a perfect backdrop for festive occasions, making listeners feel happy and uplifted. The vibrant mood and engaging rhythm make it a memorable track from the Thagararu soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thiruttu Paya Pulla from the Thagararu movie is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, brought to life by Karthik's captivating vocals. The energetic beats crafted by Dharan Kumar perfectly complement the playful lyrics, making it an instant favorite for party playlists. Dive into this catchy tune that captures the essence of youthful romance and exuberance!
stanzaMeanings: You are the one who has broken my heart, you have shattered it completely.
I have lost my breath, and with your beautiful eyes, you have captured me. I say I love you, you love me, I am feeling so happy, you are happy too. I am so excited, dreaming of everything together.
Every day I am getting closer, I am also moving forward, my heart is racing every day, love is blooming in the morning and evening.
I am feeling excited, I am thinking of you... my heart is saying that it wants to unite you and me.
Girl, oh girl, I will protect you like honey, I have spent every day alone thinking of you.
yes yes yes excuse me your love gives you ... (Thiruttu Paya Pulla ..)
